title: Latourorchis muscifera
taxonomy:
I can find some information regarding the classification of Latourorchis muscifera. 
Latourorchis muscifera is classified within the plant family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It belongs to the genus Latourorchis, which is a small group of orchids native to the Mediterranean region. Further classification places it within the subfamily Orchidoideae and the tribe Orchideae. This classification suggests that Latourorchis muscifera is a part of the larger orchid family, but its specific classification may be subject to change as research continues.
